source_text: Each suit must meet one or more of the following standards and be labeled as such: - $\quad$ SFI 3.2A/5 (or higher ex: /10, /15, /20) - $\quad$ SFI 3.4/5 (or higher ex: /10, /15, /20) - FIA Standard 1986 - FIA Standard 8856-2000 - FIA Standard 8856-2018 VE.3.3.2 Underclothing All competitors should wear fire retardant underwear (long pants and long sleeve shirt) under their approved Driver Suit

prediction.subject: SFI 3.4/5
prediction.object: one or more of the following standards and be labeled as such: - $	 SFI 3.2A/5 (or higher ex: /10, /15, /20) - $	 SFI 3.4/5 (or higher ex: /10, /15, /20) - FIA Standard 1986 - FIA Standard 8856-2000 - FIA Standard 8856-2018
